lines.speaker: Zeke
lines.text: A thousand greetings, sir.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you want to trade?

lines.speaker: Zeke
lines.text: Yes, certainly. I deal in scimitars.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nice cloak.

lines.speaker: Zeke
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you sell me a dragon scimitar?

lines.speaker: Zeke
lines.text: A dragon scimitar? A DRAGON scimitar?

lines.speaker: Zeke
lines.text: The banana-brained nitwits who make them would never dream of selling any to me.

lines.speaker: Zeke
lines.text: Seriously, you'll be a monkey's uncle before you'll ever hold a dragon scimitar.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh well, thanks anyway.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmmm, funny you should say that...

lines.speaker: Zeke
lines.text: Perhaps you'd like to take a look at my stock?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you think about Ali Morrisane?

lines.speaker: Zeke
lines.text: He is a dangerous man.

lines.speaker: Zeke
lines.text: Although he does not appear to be dangerous, he has brought several men to this town who have threatened me and several others.

lines.speaker: Zeke
lines.text: One man even threatened me with a hammer, saying that when he set up his smithy, my shoddy workmanship would be revealed!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What will you do about these threats?

lines.speaker: Zeke
lines.text: Oh, I am quite confident in the quality of my work...as will you be if you take a look at my wares.

sections.title: Using an Al kharid flyer on Zeke

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi! I have this money-off voucher!

lines.speaker: Zeke
lines.text: So I see! Unfortunately, it seems to have expired yesterday! Nevermind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I only just got it!

lines.speaker: Zeke
lines.text: I'm sorry, there's nothing I can do.

lines.speaker: Zeke
lines.text: Goodbye.
